legalPages.privacyDescription: How Protos Web handles your personal data.
legalPages.privacyBody:
Protos Web respects your privacy. We collect only the data necessary to operate this website, respond to contact requests, and improve our services.

We do not sell personal data to third parties. Analytics and cookies are used only with your consent where required.

For questions about your data, contact us at contact@protos-design.net.
legalPages.termsDescription: Terms for using the Protos Web website and services.
legalPages.termsBody:
By using this website you agree to these terms. Content, branding, and code on this site are owned by Protos Web unless otherwise stated.

Portfolio demos and showcase experiences are provided for presentation purposes. External project links open third-party sites governed by their own terms.

We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance of the updated terms.
legalPages.cookiesDescription: How Protos Web uses cookies and similar technologies.
legalPages.cookiesBody:
We use essential cookies required for basic site functionality and, with your consent, analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the site.

You can accept or decline non-essential cookies via the cookie banner or showcase entry modal. Your choice is stored locally in your browser.

You can clear cookies at any time through your browser settings.
